stoicism_streak.notes: No dedicated Stoic habit streak app found. DailyStoic.com is web newsletter only. Generic habit apps (Streaks, Habitify) exist but not Stoic-themed.

ikigai_streak.notes: r/ikigai 45K community. Ikigai.net is a lifestyle website. No mobile app for daily ikigai reflection STREAK found.

zen_practice_streak.notes: Guided meditation apps dominate. Headspace/Calm track guided session streaks. Simple unguided ZEN SITTING timer + streak is distinct.

foam_rolling_streak.notes: ROLL Recovery is guided routines, not streak accountability. No dedicated foam rolling STREAK tracker found.

cold_bath_streak.notes: Ice Bath Timer is a stopwatch. Zero streak accountability. Distinct from C072 cold_shower_streak (immersion vs shower). Post-Huberman market growing.

mobility_routine_streak.notes: Pliability/StretchIt/GOWOD are content-delivery platforms WITH streak features embedded. Soft competition territory.

touch_typing_streak.notes: Typing speed tools (Keybr, TypeRacer, 10FastFingers) are web-only. No dedicated iOS mobile touch typing STREAK app with daily accountability found.

coding_kata_streak.notes: LeetCode has daily challenge + streak (85K ratings). HackerRank has streaks. Mimo is strong gamified learner with 214K ratings. OCCUPIED.

language_immersion_streak.notes: Duolingo has 5.7M ratings with iconic streak mechanic. Language learning + streak = VERY OCCUPIED. Do not build.

knitting_streak.notes: Ravelry is web-based pattern catalog/community. Row counter apps track progress per project, NOT habit streak accountability. r/knitting 1.1M + r/crochet 1.3M. Gap confirmed.

woodworking_streak.notes: No dedicated woodworking habit streak apps found. Woodworking apps are project planners and joint calculators (Wood Shop Calculator). r/woodworking 4.2M clear.

embroidery_streak.notes: DMC Palette and iStitch are pattern/color tools NOT streak accountability. r/Embroidery 380K + r/CrossStitch 680K. Daily practice streak gap confirmed.
